# HIPAA Privacy Rule — canonical reference

## Use in matrix

- Map at **section level**.
- Ref format: `hipaa-privacy.164.<section>`

## Key sections (initial expected anchors)

- §164.502 — Uses and disclosures of PHI: general rules
- §164.504 — Uses and disclosures: organizational requirements
- §164.506 — Uses and disclosures for TPO (treatment, payment, operations)
- §164.508 — Uses and disclosures requiring authorization
- §164.510 — Uses and disclosures not requiring authorization
- §164.512 — Uses and disclosures for public interest
- §164.514 — De-identification + minimum necessary
- §164.520 — Notice of privacy practices
- §164.522 — Right to request restriction / confidential communications
- §164.524 — Right of access
- §164.526 — Right to amend
- §164.528 — Accounting of disclosures
- §164.530 — Administrative requirements (training, complaints, sanctions, mitigation)

## Notes

- Most rows expected as `documented` or `out-of-scope` — Privacy Rule is
  largely organizational. Software contribution: access logs (§164.528),
  authorization records (§164.508), data-export tooling (§164.524 access).
